case_title: TRENT E. GARNER VS. SANJAY PUNIAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARNER, TRENT E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PUNIAN, SANJAY $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,100.00, CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THE JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN TO DEFENDANT AT 8645 GARDEN HIGHWAY, YUBA CITY, CALIFORNIA THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY: A 2008 HONDA REBEL CMX 250C MOTORCYCLE LICENSE # 21U3750 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SUTTER COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT PUNIAN, SANJAY

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT PUNIAN, SANJAY HEARING SET FOR FEB-18-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT SANJAY PUNIAN. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. (506)
